title: Mock Infinite Scroll

statement.markdown:
## Mock Infinite Scroll Component

Build a mock infinite scrolling list container that appends simulated items as users scroll down.

### Requirements:
1. **Scroll Event Detection**: Add scroll event listeners detecting when viewport scrolling reaches within 50px of the container's bottom boundary limit.
2. **Throttle Fetch Requests**: Guard fetch triggers. Do not execute concurrent fetches, and load next pages only after a mock delay (e.g. 500ms using a setTimeout).
3. **DOM Rendering & End State**: Append 5 card list items per page. Limit loading up to 5 total pages, rendering an end-of-list message once the maximum page count is reached.

constraints: Must correctly calculate scroll heights (scrollTop, clientHeight, scrollHeight)
Must use loading state flags to prevent duplicate fetches

starterCode.html:
Item #1
Item #2
Item #3
Item #4
Item #5
Loading items...

gradingCriteria.description: Verify scrolling to the bottom triggers fetching mechanics correctly.
Verify duplicate parallel fetches are guarded, page pagination increments, and loading indicator toggles.
